task_completion.description: Verify that at least 4 partition walls and 3 doors have been added to separate the space.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan view of Sweet Home 3D, count at least 4 distinct new wall segments drawn to divide the space into zones, and at least 3 door icons placed within the walls.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 4 rooms are defined, with at least 2 having distinct floor colors or textures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, identify at least 4 distinct room areas (Vault, Reading Room, Conservation Lab, Reception). At least 2 of these rooms must have a visible floor color or texture applied, distinct from the default.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 12 high-density storage items are placed in the Vault.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, count at least 12 bookcases, shelves, or cabinets located in the area designated as the Secure Vault.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 7 desks/tables and 10 chairs are placed in the Reading Room and staff areas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, count at least 7 desks or tables and at least 10 chairs distributed across the Reading Room and Reception/staff areas.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 1 sink is placed in the Conservation Lab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, locate at least 1 sink item in the area designated as the Conservation Lab.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 2 dimension lines are drawn in the Vault.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan view, look for at least 2 dimension lines (lines with measurement numbers) placed between storage items or walls in the Vault to document aisle widths.

task_completion.description: Verify that the completed layout contains at least 45 total furniture items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the furniture list panel on the left side of the screen to see if there are at least 45 items listed, or visually confirm a dense layout across all zones that would sum to at least 45 items.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to create the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application window with the 2D plan, 3D view, and furniture catalog being actively used.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply write a script to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing python scripts or XML editing of the .sh3d file to complete the task.

integrity.description: Verify the agent saved the work properly within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Sweet Home 3D window should show the file name 'archive_shell_starter.sh3d' (or similar) in the title bar, and a save action (like clicking the floppy disk icon or File > Save) should be visible or implied at the end.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified expectations: 12 storage items, 7 desks, 10 chairs, 4 new walls, 3 new doors, 4 defined rooms (2 colored), 2 dimension annotations, and 45 total furniture items. The starter file is archive_shell_starter.sh3d.
